items: Right-click a file or folder in the file tree to add it straight to your repository's .gitignore, without leaving the app.
When you open a new tab from a template, you can now give that tab a custom name instead of taking the template's default.
On macOS, microphone, folder, and system permissions now stick from one launch to the next, so you're no longer prompted for the same access again and again.
An agent's activity dot now stays a steady blue while it's working through bursts of background output, instead of flickering.
The progress bar shown while a repository clones is back to a clean, plain loading bar.
